Name: ARROW_PARAM
Description: Defines parameters for ammunition, covering arrows, greatarrows and bolts.

Fields.Name: Display SFX for Aim
Fields.Description: The arrow SFX to display when aiming this arrow.

Fields.Name: Slot 0: Light Bullet
Fields.Description: The bullet to trigger on light attack for slot 0.

Fields.Name: Slot 0: Heavy Bullet
Fields.Description: The bullet to trigger on heavy attack for slot 0.

Fields.Name: Slot 0: Light Bullet Damage
Fields.Description: The damage profile to use for light bullet in slot 0.

Fields.Name: Slot 0: Heavy Bullet Damage
Fields.Description: The damage profile to use for heavy bullet in slot 0.

Fields.Name: Slot 1: Light Bullet
Fields.Description: The bullet to trigger on light attack for slot 1.

Fields.Name: Slot 1: Heavy Bullet
Fields.Description: The bullet to trigger on heavy attack for slot 1.

Fields.Name: Slot 1: Light Bullet Damage
Fields.Description: The damage profile to use for light bullet in slot 1.

Fields.Name: Slot 1: Heavy Bullet Damage
Fields.Description: The damage profile to use for heavy bullet in slot 1.

Fields.Name: Slot 2: Light Bullet
Fields.Description: The bullet to trigger on light attack for slot 2.

Fields.Name: Slot 2: Heavy Bullet
Fields.Description: The bullet to trigger on heavy attack for slot 2.

Fields.Name: Slot 2: Light Bullet Damage
Fields.Description: The damage profile to use for light bullet in slot 2.

Fields.Name: Slot 2: Heavy Bullet Damage
Fields.Description: The damage profile to use for heavy bullet in slot 2.

Fields.Name: Slot 3: Light Bullet
Fields.Description: The bullet to trigger on light attack for slot 3.

Fields.Name: Slot 3: Heavy Bullet
Fields.Description: The bullet to trigger on heavy attack for slot 3.

Fields.Name: Slot 3: Light Bullet Damage
Fields.Description: The damage profile to use for light bullet in slot 3.

Fields.Name: Slot 3: Heavy Bullet Damage
Fields.Description: The damage profile to use for heavy bullet in slot 3.

Fields.Name: Quiver Model ID
Fields.Description: The model ID of the arrow within the quiver.

Fields.Name: Menu: Physical Attack
Fields.Description: The physical attack to display for this arrow in the menu. Display only.

Fields.Name: Menu: Magic Attack
Fields.Description: The magic attack to display for this arrow in the menu. Display only.

Fields.Name: Menu: Lightning Attack
Fields.Description: The lightning attack to display for this arrow in the menu. Display only.

Fields.Name: Menu: Fire Attack
Fields.Description: The fire attack to display for this arrow in the menu. Display only.

Fields.Name: Menu: Dark Attack
Fields.Description: The dark attack to display for this arrow in the menu. Display only.

Fields.Name: Menu: Poison Attack
Fields.Description: The poison attack to display for this arrow in the menu. Display only.

Fields.Name: Menu: Bleed Attack
Fields.Description: The bleed attack to display for this arrow in the menu. Display only.

Fields.Name: Menu: Durability Attack
Fields.Description: The durability attack to display for this arrow in the menu. Display only.

Fields.Name: Arrow Type
Fields.Description: The type of arrow this is.

Fields.Name: Menu: Attack Attribute 1
Fields.Description: The first attack attribute for this arrow.

Fields.Name: Menu: Attack Attribute 2
Fields.Description: The second attack attribute for this arrow.
